title: Banisteriopsis vernoniifolia
taxonomy: Banisteriopsis vernoniifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae. It belongs to the genus Banisteriopsis and is part of the Malpighiales order. The plant is native to the Amazon rainforest and is closely related to other species within the same family. Banisteriopsis vernoniifolia is known to be a relatively rare and understudied species within the botanical community. Its classification is primarily based on morphological characteristics and phylogenetic analysis.
